brief_summary: Three mount-style cards side by side. Left (warm-grey outline, 'premium tier default'): gasket-mount with a mini cross-section showing plate-on-gaskets. Center (coral filled, 'the Nyawice pick'): leaf-spring F1 with mini cross-section showing plate suspended on metal leaves. Right (faded warm-grey, 'budget tier'): tray-mount with screws to bottom case. Caption: 'the mount is the editorial story'.
data_sources: cannonkeys-nyawice-group-buy.mdx § 'The mount is the story' — 'Most Alice boards in 2026 land on one of two mount families. Gasket-mount is the dominant choice on the premium tier; tray-mount survives at the budget tier ... The Nyawice picks a third, less-trafficked option: a leaf-spring F1 mount'

cannonkeys-nyawice-group-buy.mdx § Callout — 'Leaf-spring mounts suspend the plate on metal leaves rather than on silicone or poron gasket strips ... sharper, more uniform feedback at the cost of some of the cushioned-bottom-out character'
